subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are drawn towards God! A wave from the ocean of the Covenant hath arisen and struck the shores of America [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منجذب الی الله موجی از بحر میثاق برخواست و بر قطعه امریک زد دور را
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
